## Text-Based RPG Shop & Inventory System

Welcome to my Python RPG Shop project! This is a beginner-friendly, text-based game script where a player can interact with a shopkeeper, manage their gold, and buy or sell fantasy items.

## Features
* **Interactive Menu:** A continuous game loop that lets the player choose their actions.
* **Dynamic Buying & Selling:** Players can buy items if they have enough gold, and sell items back to the shop for 70% of the original value.
* **Shopkeeper AI:** The shopkeeper has a randomized "mood" generated by the `random` module, meaning they won't always agree to buy your items!
* **Inventory Management:** Tracks the player's current coin balance and item quantities using Python dictionaries.

## What I Learned
I built this project to practice my core Python skills. The main concepts I tackled include:
* Using **Dictionaries** (`.get()`, `.update()`, and key assignments) to manage data.
* Writing `while True` loops and controlling the flow with `break`.
* Input sanitization (using `.lower()`) so the game doesn't crash from weird user inputs.
* Debugging **Variable Scope** and handling `NoneType` errors when checking for items that don't exist yet.

## A Note on Progress
*I am leaving the code in its original, slightly raw state (with my own comments and notes) rather than using advanced methods like D.R.Y. that I haven't fully learned yet. This repository acts as a time capsule so I can track my real progress as I continue to level up as a developer!*
